name: MuseDock Cloud
description: Hosting platform module. Tenant registration, hosting plans, domain registration, DNS management via Cloudflare. Requires MuseDock Shop.
author: Screen Art S.L.U.

changes: Initial implementation: module structure, bootstrap, routes, translations (es/en)
4 database tables: cloud_plans, cloud_tenants, cloud_domains, cloud_dns_records
Listeners: OnOrderCompleted, OnSubscriptionRenewed, OnSubscriptionCancelled (listen to Shop events)
RegisterController: handles POST /register, subdomain validation, free plan direct provisioning, paid plan redirect to Shop checkout, AJAX check-subdomain endpoint
PlanController: public /plans page with plan cards
Superadmin controllers: CloudPlanController (CRUD), CloudTenantController (list/show/suspend/activate), CloudDomainController, CloudSettingsController (Cloudflare + general config)
13 Blade views: registration form with plan selection, plans page, customer dashboard, superadmin CRUD for plans/tenants/domains/settings
Admin menu: Cloud > Planes, Tenants, Dominios, Configuración
Seeded Free plan: 1GB disk, 10 pages, 50 posts, SSL, blog, .musedock.com subdomain
Bootstrap: registers Shop event listeners (shop_order_completed, shop_subscription_*) for auto-provisioning
CSRF exclusion added for Stripe webhook endpoint
